unavailableBody: Try again in a moment, or relaunch the app.

restore.nothingBody: No past purchase was found on this Apple ID. If you bought RecipeGen on a different Apple ID, switch to it in iPhone Settings → Apple ID and try again.
restore.inactiveBody: We found a past purchase but it isn't currently active. Sign in to the RecipeGen account that owns the subscription, then try Restore again.
